startPoint.en: Talk to Vestri or Austri, near the White Wolf Mountain.
startPoint.es: Habla con Vestri o Austri, cerca de White Wolf Mountain.

items.name: Garlic
items.display: Garlic (available as a respawn on the table in a Seers' Village house, in an upstairs drawer of Morgan's house in Draynor Village, or in a player-owned house larder)

rewards.name: White Wolf Mountain
rewards.display: Access to the White Wolf Mountain shortcut

rewards.name: Keldagrim minecart system
rewards.display: The ability to use the mine cart system to White Wolf Mountain (also requires completion of the quest The Giant Dwarf)

rewards.name: Beyond
rewards.display: Beyond (in the tunnel beneath White Wolf Mountain accessible after completing the quest)

text.en: Talk to either Austri (north of the Taverley lodestone) or Vestri (north of the Catherby lodestone) who can both be found guarding caves on either side of White Wolf Mountain.
text.es: Habla con Austri (al norte de la piedra de viaje de Taverley) o con Vestri (al norte de la piedra de viaje de Catherby), a quienes puedes encontrar custodiando cuevas a ambos lados de White Wolf Mountain.

chatOptions: 1 I was wondering what was down that tunnel?
3 If you were my friend I wouldn't mind it.
1 And how am I meant to do that?

text.en: If you don't have the worms:
Go to McGrubor's Wood just west of the Seers' Village lodestone and enter through the loose railing along the north fence, or use fairy ring ALS .
text.es: Ve a McGrubor's Wood, justo al oeste de la piedra de viaje de Seers' Village, y entra por la valla suelta a lo largo del cercado norte, o usa un anillo de las hadas ALS.

text.en: Run to the west side of the woods and 'check' the red-coloured vines to receive red vine worms; take at least three.
text.es: Corre hacia el lado oeste del bosque y "examina" las enredaderas de color rojo para conseguir gusanos de enredadera roja; coge al menos tres.

text.en: Head to Hemenster (south-west of Seers' Village and directly west of the Ranging Guild).
text.es: Dirígete a Hemenster (al suroeste de Seers' Village y justo al oeste del Ranging Guild).

text.en: Use the garlic on the eastern wall pipes by the north side.
text.es: Usa el ajo en las tuberías del muro este, junto al lado norte.

text.en: Either talk to Bonzo and pay him 5 coins or fish at a fishing spot to start the contest.
text.es: Habla con Bonzo y págale 5 monedas, o pesca en un punto de pesca para iniciar el concurso.

text.en: Fish at the newly obtained fishing spot until a Raw giant carp is caught.
text.es: Pesca en el punto de pesca recién obtenido hasta conseguir una Carpa gigante cruda.

text.en: Report back to Austri or Vestri.
text.es: Vuelve a informar a Austri o Vestri.
